'''Contruum Six''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Contruum system/Legends|Contruum system]].

A small, [[Water/Legends|icy]] world with only two notable [[City/Legends|cities]], Contruum 6 was basically an outpost of the major [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] center of [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]], with which it shared the same star system. Relative remoteness within the system was combined with excellent [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] links, however—the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] lay just a [[Precision hyperspace jump|micro-jump]] away, and two micro-jumps brought you to the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]].

For this reason, Contruum 6 was used by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] as a major staging-point in the final stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], where half the Alliance's available warships, including battlegroups from as far afield as [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]], gathered prior to the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]].
